trigger: A candidate record enters the review queue for possible warm recovery follow-up.
finished_state: A private review packet and draft recommendation exists, or the candidate is refused/hard-refused with reason.

sinks.happy: private review packet ready for human review
sinks.refuse: candidate held for missing context or low confidence
sinks.hard_refuse: candidate blocked because consent, identity, PHI, or account-match safety failed

known_residue: Draft tone may require human editing
Human reviewer remains responsible for any send decision
